name: med_reconciliation
description: a medication reconciliation world: a patient's med list with interaction risk; actions add_med, remove_med, flag_interaction

card.description: a medication reconciliation world: a patient's med list with interaction risk; actions add_med, remove_med, flag_interaction

rules: add_med adds action.params['name'] to the med list if not already present.
remove_med removes action.params['name'] and discards any flag that named it.
flag_interaction reviews one interacting pair: the pair in action.params['pair'] if given and currently interacting, otherwise the highest-severity interaction not yet flagged.
risk_score is the sum of severities over every interacting pair of current meds; interaction_count is how many such pairs exist.
unreviewed_count is the number of interacting pairs not yet flagged and is never negative.
Interactions are scored from a fixed knowledge base; severity is 1 (minor), 2 (moderate), or 3 (major).
